import React from 'react' import styled from 'styled-components' import Checkbox from './Checkbox' import Search from './static/search.png' const SidebarWrapper = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; width:100%; ` const DepartmentWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const CategoryWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const SizeWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const DesignerWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const PriceWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const ConditionWrapper = styled.div ` margin:10px 0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; width:100%; ` const SidebarTitles = styled.div ` font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:700; ` const SeparationBar = styled.div ` width:100%; background-color:#BDC0BA; height:1px; ` const MenswearTitle = styled.div ` font-wieght:900; font-size:1rem; margin-left:-15px; ` const MenswearSection = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:40px; ` const WomenswearSection = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:40px; ` const Catogories = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; ` const Category = styled.div ` margin:7px 0; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; width:100%; ` const CheckboxesWrapper = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:20px; ` const Name = styled.div ` font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:500; ` const Arrow = styled.div ` width:10px; height:10px; background-color:#1C1C1C; -webkit-clip-path:polygon(0 40%, 50% 85%, 100% 40%, 100% 55%, 50% 100%, 0 55%); ` const DesignerSearchbarWrapper = styled.div ` position:relative; margin:20px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; margin-left:20px; ` const DesignerSearchBar = styled.input ` width:80%; height:30px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid grey; ` const SearchImage = styled.div ` background-image:url(${Search }); width:15px; height:15px; background-position:center; background-size:cover; position:absolute; margin-left:10px; background-color:white; ` const PriceSection = styled.div ` display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; margin:20px 0; ` const MinPrice = styled.input ` margin-right:10px; width:70px; height:25px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid grey; ` const MaxPrice = styled.input ` margin-left:10px; width:70px; height:25px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid grey; ` export default function Sidebar () { return ( Department Menswear Womenswear Category Menswear Top All Tops Long Sleeve T-shirts Shirts Sweaters & Knitwear Sweatshirts & Hoodies TankTop & Sleeveless Jerseys Bottoms All Bottoms Casual Pants Cropped Pants Denim Leggings Overalls & Jumpsuits Shorts Sweatpants & Joggers Swimwear OuterWear All Outerwear Bombers Cloaks & Capes Denim Jackets Heavy Coats Leather Jackets Light Jackets Parkas Raincoats Vests Footwear All Footwear Boots Casual Leather Shoes Formal Shoes Hi-Top Sneakers Low-Top Sneakers Sandals Slip Ons Tailoring All Tailoring Blazers Formal Shirting Formal Trousers Accessories All Accessories Bags & Luggage Belts Glasses Gloves & Scarves Hats Jewelry & Watches Wallets Sunglasses Womenswear Top All Tops Crop Tops Bodysuits Long Sleeve T-shirts Shirts Sweaters Sweatshirts & Hoodies TankTop & Sleeveless Jerseys Bottoms All Bottoms Casual Pants Joggers Jeans Leggings Jumpsuits Shorts Sweatpants & Joggers Maxi Skirts Midi Skirts Mini Skirts OuterWear All Outerwear Blazer Denim Jackets Coats Jackets Vests Footwear All Footwear Boots Heels Low-Top Sneakers Sandals Flats Dresses All Dresses Maxi Dresses Midi Dresses Mini Dresses Accessories All Accessories Belts Glasses Gloves & Scarves Hats Jewelry & Watches Wallets Sunglasses Scarves Bags & Lugguage All Bags & Lugguage Crossbody Bags Handle Bags Shoulder Bags Tote Bags Size XXS XS S M L XL XXL Designer XXS XS S M L XL XXL Price
